teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective finish_hand.

partnerBelief.summary: My partner (player 2, team 0) has three cards and knows I am down to two. Their objective is to let me finish first if possible, so they will not overtake my A♠ unless they hold an unavoidable higher card or need to block an opponent. They may also signal by passing or playing low if they can afford to.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents (players 1 and 3, team 1) each have three cards and want to prevent me from going out. If I lead low, either opponent with any spade can take the trick cheaply. If I lead high, an opponent who is void in spades may spend a trump-7 to stop me, but that still costs them a high card.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Selected play-single-spade-A-copy2 after deterministic schema repair of ToM reasoning.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Legal alternative retained for verifier comparison after schema repair.

risks: Schema repair may preserve imperfect reasoning from the raw model output.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Treat the repaired trace as schema-normalized reasoning; do not add hidden-card facts beyond the raw output.

notes: Deterministically schema-repaired from a ToM-prompted raw output; selectedActionId is unchanged.
